psalm-81-1.verse:
Sing for joy to God our strength;
  Shout joyfully to the God of Jacob.
psalm-81-1.prayer: Lord, fill my heart with joyful praise. Help me sing to You with gratitude because You are my strength and my God.

psalm-81-2.verse:
Raise a song, strike the timbrel,
  The sweet sounding lyre with the harp.
psalm-81-2.prayer: Father, awaken worship within me. Let every part of my life join in praise to Your holy name.

psalm-81-3.verse:
Blow the trumpet at the new moon,
  At the full moon, on our feast day.
psalm-81-3.prayer: Lord, teach me to honor sacred rhythms of worship, remembrance, and celebration before You.

psalm-81-4.verse:
For it is a statute for Israel,
  An ordinance of the God of Jacob.
psalm-81-4.prayer: Father, help me obey Your ways and remember the instructions You have given to Your people.

psalm-81-5.verse:
He established it for a testimony in Joseph
  When he went throughout the land of Egypt.
  I heard a language that I did not know:
psalm-81-5.prayer: Lord, thank You for establishing testimony and truth among Your people. Help me listen when You speak.

psalm-81-6.verse:
“I relieved his shoulder of the burden,
  His hands were freed from the basket.
psalm-81-6.prayer: Father, thank You for lifting burdens and setting people free. Remove what weighs me down and lead me into Your rest.

psalm-81-7.prayer: Lord, when I cry out in distress, thank You for hearing and answering me. Help me trust Your presence in every trial.

psalm-81-8.verse:
Hear, O My people, and I will admonish you;
  O Israel, if you would listen to Me!
psalm-81-8.prayer: Father, give me ears to hear Your warning and instruction. Help my heart remain teachable and obedient.

psalm-81-9.verse:
Let there be no strange god among you;
  Nor shall you worship any foreign god.
psalm-81-9.prayer: Lord, keep me from idols and anything that competes with my devotion to You.

psalm-81-10.prayer: Father, You are the Lord my God who provides. Open my heart to receive what only You can give.

psalm-81-11.verse:
“But My people did not listen to My voice,
  And Israel did not obey Me.
psalm-81-11.prayer: Lord, forgive me when I resist Your voice or refuse Your ways. Draw me back to faithful obedience.

psalm-81-12.verse:
So I gave them over to the stubbornness of their heart,
  To walk in their own devices.
psalm-81-12.prayer: Father, protect me from stubbornness and from following the desires of my own heart apart from You.

psalm-81-13.verse:
Oh that My people would listen to Me,
  That Israel would walk in My ways!
psalm-81-13.prayer: Lord, help me listen to You and walk in Your ways with humility, faith, and trust.

psalm-81-14.verse:
I would quickly subdue their enemies
  And turn My hand against their adversaries.
psalm-81-14.prayer: Father, defeat what opposes Your will in my life and lead me into freedom through obedience.

psalm-81-15.verse:
Those who hate the Lord would pretend obedience to Him,
  And their time of punishment would be forever.
psalm-81-15.prayer: Lord, let every false thing lose its power before You. Establish truth, reverence, and faithfulness in my heart.

psalm-81-16.verse:
But I would feed you with the finest of the wheat,
  And with honey from the rock I would satisfy you.”
psalm-81-16.prayer: Father, satisfy me with Your goodness. Feed my soul with what is pure, lasting, and life-giving.

psalm-81-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my strength, my deliverer, and my faithful provider. Teach me to listen to Your voice, reject every idol, and walk in Your ways with a willing heart. Free me from stubbornness, satisfy my soul with Your goodness, and let my life be filled with joyful praise and obedient worship.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-81-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my strength, my deliverer, and my faithful provider. Teach me to listen to Your voice, reject every idol, and walk in Your ways with a willing heart. Free me from stubbornness, satisfy my soul with Your goodness, and let my life be filled with joyful praise and obedient worship.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
